audit_items.proof_trace: Every dereference in this file operates on a value guaranteed non-null by construction: `&_cond` and `&mutex._lock` are addresses of C++ member variables (never null), `&ts` is the address of a stack-allocated `timespec` (never null), and `ts` in the private `calculate_expiration` is only ever called with `&ts` (line 43). No raw pointer parameter is accepted or stored and later blindly dereferenced.
